title: CVE-2026-46817: Oracle E-Business Suite RCE
summary: [P1] A critical security flaw in Oracle E-Business Suite is being actively exploited in the wild, allowing for remote code execution. No patch is currently available. Why now: Active exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: Remote code execution vulnerability in a widely used enterprise software suite.

title: CVE-2026-48558: SimpleHelp RCE
summary: [P1] A recently disclosed vulnerability in SimpleHelp is being exploited to deploy TaskWeaver and Djinn Stealer. No patch is currently available. Why now: Active exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: Remote code execution vulnerability in a software product.

primary.title: Attackers Exploit SimpleHelp CVE-2026-48558 to Deploy TaskWeaver and Djinn Stealer
